scripts.cap:sync: node scripts/copy-cap.cjs && npm run build:www && npx cap sync android && node scripts/patch-android.cjs
scripts.android:setup: node scripts/copy-cap.cjs && npm run build:www && npx cap add android && node scripts/patch-android.cjs
scripts.android:open: npm run cap:sync && npx cap open android
scripts.apk:debug: npm run cap:sync && node scripts/build-apk.cjs debug
scripts.apk:release: npm run cap:sync && node scripts/build-apk.cjs release
